_purpose: Forensic recompute of pilot B_RLHF values to resolve audit rows A.13 / A.14 (paper §6.1).
_generated_by: scripts/run_config_simulation re-runs of seed=42, N=50, T=30 (cmp_llm_s42_condA and cmp_llm_s42_condB) under post-patch code (L-1, L-2, C-1 fixes).

original_pilot_claim.source: phase_c_comparison (canonical pre-patch single-seed N=50 T=30 run)
original_pilot_claim.reason: Both values exceed the theoretical bounds derivable from TV(pi, pi_uniform) for a 3-action distribution. 0.712 > 2/3; 0.420 > maximum achievable TV given cooperation = 0.582. Canonical phase_c_comparison directory is not present on the current host, so a direct recompute on the original event log is not possible.

post_patch_recompute.code_state: post commit c73554e (L-1, L-2, C-1 patches in effect)
post_patch_recompute.forensic_finding: Under the patched code at seed=42, ablation_level=0 (Condition A) and ablation_level=5 (Condition B) produce BYTE-IDENTICAL events.jsonl streams. Configs differ only on experiment_id and llm.ablation_level. Action triplets and B_RLHF values are therefore identical across conditions for this seed (0.2347 each). This single-seed observation is consistent with the §8.1 N=100 10-seed non-replication: at this scale of pilot run, the ESS grounding context does not perturb the Mistral-7B action distribution relative to the no-grounding baseline.
post_patch_recompute.caveat: Single seed and a single (N, T) configuration. The byte-identity result may be an artifact of deterministic generation with a fixed seed when the grounded prompt-context delta is small enough not to alter argmax sampling at temperature ~0. It does not establish that grounding has no effect under all sampling settings; it does establish that for seed 42 on the patched code, no per-action divergence appears between A and B.

audit_resolution.A.13: RESOLVED-BY-WITHDRAWAL: B_RLHF(A) = 0.712 is withdrawn (mathematically impossible under TV; original event log unavailable on current host). Post-patch single-seed value for the same seed is 0.2347.
audit_resolution.A.14: RESOLVED-BY-WITHDRAWAL: B_RLHF(B) = 0.420 is withdrawn (mathematically impossible under TV given coop=0.582; original event log unavailable on current host). Post-patch single-seed value is 0.2347.
